comment: Source XML placed the boundary mid-phrase: word 12 was يَٰٓأُو۟ (yā-ʾuli) and word 13 was لِيٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ. Transliteration already implied the correct split.
Cairo XML misplaced the leading و: position 10 had وَكَانُوا and position 17 had كَانُوا۟. The printed Cairo 1924 mushaf has them reversed (matching Madinah and the canonical Hafs reading).
